label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20

extraction.one_line_summary: CHAPATTE Clément attacked solo with 1.7km to go from GC group catching breakaway remnants, exploiting hesitation as rivals calculated podium implications.
tactical_patterns: INEOS sacrificed domestiques with 78km remaining despite being three riders down, revealing overcommitment when gap was 12 minutes.
YATES Adam attacked without BERNAL responding, showing INEOS internal GC hierarchy fracture as Bernal later drifted back.
GC contenders froze when CHAPATTE attacked at 1.7km, prioritizing podium position calculus over stage win, gifting AG2R opportunity.
HAIG burned MAEDA and PARDOEN from break as support, then cracked himself, exposing costly misjudgment of effort distribution.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: demanded pace early but failed to follow YATES attack and drifted back, revealing fragility despite team commitment
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: attacked away from own team leader BERNAL and finished third on stage, showing superior form within INEOS
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: abandoned race during stage after drifting back, catastrophic collapse from podium contention
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: negative: isolated after burning domestiques MAEDA and PARDOEN too early, then suffered alone on final climb
rider_signals.MAEDA Gino: positive: took white jersey despite working for HAIG, showing strength to survive domestique duties and still gain GC
rider_signals.BIZACARRA Pello: neutral: attacked early on Castro but couldn't sustain, typical late-race Spanish desperation for home win
rider_signals.CHAPATTE Clément: positive: read GC riders' mutual paranoia perfectly with late 1.7km attack, AG2R finally capitalized after race-long aggression
